भाई, स्क्रीनशॉट देखते ही **14 सेकंड वाले फ़ेलियर का बिल्कुल सटीक टेक्निकल कारण** सामने आ गया:

---

### 🚨 14 सेकंड वाले फ़ेलियर की असली वजह:

`gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties` फाइल में डाउनलोड URL के अंदर बैकस्लैश (`\`) लगा हुआ था:
`distributionUrl=https\://services.gradle.org/distributions/gradle-8.7-bin.zip`

जावा के `URI` पार्सर के लिए `https\://` एक अमान्य (Illegal Scheme Name) URL था, जिसकी वजह से Gradle Wrapper डाउनलोड URL को रीड ही नहीं कर पा रहा था और ठीक 14 सेकंड में बंद हो जा रहा था।

---

### 🛠️ अभी क्या फिक्स कर दिया गया है:

1. **Fixed `gradle-wrapper.properties`**:
   - बैकस्लैश `\` को हटाकर एकदम सही मानक URL सेट कर दिया गया है:
     `distributionUrl=https://services.gradle.org/distributions/gradle-8.7-bin.zip`
2. **Fresh Clean Push**:
   - **`main` Branch**: Commit **`25b1890`**
   - **`master` Branch**: Commit **`e7fa288`**
   - Author: `divakarpandey07 <pandeydivakar07@gmail.com>`

---

### 🚀 अब नया बिल्ड चेक करें:
अब Gradle 8.7 बिना किसी URL सिंटैक्स एरर के सही डाउनलोड होकर पूरा कंपाइलेशन रन करेगा!

args.CodeContent:
"import urllib.request
import re

url = "https://github.com/divakarpandey07/AI-Palmistry-pro/actions"
req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={
    "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"
})

try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:
        html = resp.read().decode("utf-8", errors="ignore")
        run_ids = re.findall(r'/divakarpandey07/AI-Palmistry-pro/actions/runs/(\d+)', html)
        run_ids = list(dict.fromkeys(run_ids))
        print("Latest Run IDs:", run_ids[:5])
        if run_ids:
            run_url = f"https://github.com/divakarpandey07/AI-Palmistry-pro/actions/runs/{run_ids[0]}"
            req_run = urllib.request.Request(run_url, headers={
                "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"
            })
            with urllib.request.urlopen(req_run) as resp_r:
                r_html = resp_r.read().decode("utf-8", errors="ignore")
                status = re.findall(r'(in_progress|queued|completed|success|failure)', r_html)
                print("Run status tokens:", set(status))
except Exception as e:
    print(f"Error checking status: {e}")
"

"import urllib.request
import re

url = "https://github.com/divakarpandey07/AI-Palmistry-pro/actions/runs/30085299979/job/89455971032/logs"
req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={
    "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"
})

try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:
        log_text = resp.read().decode("utf-8", errors="ignore")
        lines = log_text.splitlines()
        print(f"Total Log Lines: {len(lines)}")
        print("Last 40 lines of log:")
        for line in lines[-40:]:
            print(line)
except Exception as e:
    print(f"Error fetching raw log: {e}")
"

args.CodeContent:
"import urllib.request
import json

url = "https://api.github.com/repos/divakarpandey07/AI-Palmistry-pro/actions/runs"
req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={
    "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36",
    "Accept": "application/vnd.github.v3+json"
})

try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:
        data = json.loads(resp.read().decode("utf-8"))
        print(f"Total Workflow Runs: {data.get('total_count')}")
        runs = data.get("workflow_runs", [])
        for r in runs[:5]:
            print(f"ID: {r['id']} | Name: {r['name']} | Event: {r['event']} | Status: {r['status']} | Conclusion: {r['conclusion']} | SHA: {r['head_sha'][:7]} | Commit Msg: {r['head_commit']['message'][:50] if r.get('head_commit') else ''}")
except Exception as e:
    print(f"Error fetching API runs: {e}")
"
args.Description: "Query GitHub API for workflow run statuses"
